implementation_summary.summary: CP00-710 extends the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P06 scope inventory, contract, type, workflow, permission, fixture, and test/golden bridge descriptor over 150 planned units from RP23.P06.M00.S07 through RP23.P06.M07.S06 while preserving CP00-694 through CP00-709 as historical foundation evidence and keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission, audit, Hermes, and runtime surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-710 finance integrations P06 scope inventory test bridge pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-710 RP23.P06.M00.S07-RP23.P06.M07.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
